analysis: Loos & Co. manufactures aircraft cable, wire rope, cable assemblies, hardware/fittings, and CNC-machined components to MIL-SPEC and commercial standards for aerospace, defense, automotive, marine, and medical industries.

codes.reasoning: The company explicitly manufactures wire rope and aircraft cable in stainless steel, galvanized carbon steel, and other alloys.
codes.evidence: Aircraft Cable Loos and Company manufactures and stocks aircraft cable to commercial and military specifications in stainless steel, galvanized carbon steel, and a variety of other alloys.

codes.reasoning: The company manufactures wire rope fittings and accessories, which are fittings for rope and cable.
codes.evidence: Hardware & Fittings​ Loos & Co., Inc. has long been a manufacturer of high-quality wire rope fittings and accessories for a variety of industries.

codes.description: Cable, Cord, Wire Assemblies; Communications Equipment
codes.reasoning: The company manufactures cable assemblies for aerospace and defense applications, matching this FSC category for cable and wire assemblies.
codes.evidence: Cable Assemblies​ We maintain large inventories of both bare and coated cable as well as fittings to satisfy your immediate needs.

codes.reasoning: The company produces nonelectrical wire (aircraft cable and wire rope) in various steel alloys.
codes.evidence: When looking for the highest quality domestic Wire Rope in stainless steel, galvanized, bright carbon steel and a variety of other alloys, we deliver.

codes.reasoning: The company manufactures commercial hardware including wire rope fittings, bushings, and accessories for various industries.
codes.evidence: We specialize in manufacturing high-quality Aerospace & Defense Cables, Cable Assemblies, Hardware, Bushings and more.

codes.reasoning: The company explicitly manufactures bushings, which fall under the FSC category for bushings, rings, shims and spacers.
codes.evidence: We specialize in manufacturing high-quality Aerospace & Defense Cables, Cable Assemblies, Hardware, Bushings and more.

codes.reasoning: Wire rope and rigging products manufactured by Loos are used in block, tackle, rigging and sling applications.
codes.evidence: Wire Rope When looking for the highest quality domestic Wire Rope in stainless steel, galvanized, bright carbon steel and a variety of other alloys, we deliver.

codes.reasoning: The company serves the marine industry and manufactures wire rope and cable products used in rigging and rigging gear for ships.
The company manufactures MIL-SPEC aircraft cable assemblies and hardware components used in airframe structural applications.
The company produces nonelectrical wire in nonferrous base metals such as stainless steel alloys.
codes.evidence: manufactures and stocks aircraft cable to commercial and military specifications in stainless steel, galvanized carbon steel, and a variety of other alloys
